name: podwaffle-mobile
description: PodWaffle native mobile app powered by Capacitor

scripts.sync: npm run prepare-web && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run sync && npx cap run android
scripts.android:open: npm run sync && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run sync && npx cap run ios
scripts.ios:open: npm run sync && npx cap open ios
